description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring a prominent marquee at the top with the title 'Crystal Mines II' in bold, stylized lettering. The front panel includes a large display screen, a control panel with multiple buttons and joysticks, and a coin slot area below. The side panels are adorned with vibrant, detailed artwork depicting a futuristic robot miner wielding a tool, set against a dramatic, colorful background. The cabinet is primarily dark green with bright yellow and orange accents, and the control panel is designed for two players with symmetrical button layouts. The back of the cabinet is plain and utilitarian, with ventilation slots and access panels. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a hard, glossy finish typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A classic upright arcade cabinet with 'Crystal Mines II' marquee, vibrant robot-themed side art, and a dual-player control panel. The cabinet is dark green with colorful accents and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, display screen, dual-player control panel with buttons and joysticks, and coin slot area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the detailed robot miner artwork and the cabinet's contoured profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, dark green back panel with ventilation slots and access panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same vibrant robot miner artwork and contoured shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of controls, each with a joystick and three buttons, arranged side-by-side for two-player gameplay; controls are light-colored and symmetrically placed.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Crystal Mines II' title in bold red-orange letters with a mining robot and crystal-themed background in yellow, orange, and blue hues.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display vibrant artwork of a futuristic robot miner with metallic blue and silver tones, set against a dramatic orange and yellow background, contributing to a sci-fi mining theme.
